alkylation reagent: Samples were then alkylated using a 50 mm working concentration of iodacetamide (IAA, SIGMA‐ALDRICH, St Louis, MO, USA)
alkylation concentration: Samples were then alkylated using a 50 mm working concentration of iodacetamide (IAA, SIGMA‐ALDRICH, St Louis, MO, USA)
cleavage agent: This was followed by trypsin digestion, where trypsin (Pierce Trypsin Protease MS‐grade, Thermo Scientific, UK)
collision energy: DIA MS2 spectra were collected with higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) fragmentation collision energy (CE) 32%.
fragmentation method: DIA MS2 spectra were collected with higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) fragmentation.
instrument: DIA analysis was performed on an UltiMate 3000 system (Thermo) coupled with the Orbitrap Ascend Mass Spectrometer (Thermo).
reduction reagent: Reduction of disulfide bonds was carried out by adding Dithiothreitol (DTT, SIGMA‐ALDRICH, St Louis, MO, USA)
reduction concentration: Dithiothreitol (DTT, SIGMA‐ALDRICH, St Louis, MO, USA) at a working concentration of 10 mm.
